## Description

```
how order 3d print in nan chang vietnam?
```

```
Ordering a 3D print in Nanchang (China) or Vietnam requires a simple five-step online workflow. You can submit your files to regional manufacturing platforms, choose your material, get a quote, and have the physical part shipped directly to your door. [[1](https://www.intamsys.com/printing-service), [2](https://www.sculpteo.com/en/#:~:text=Using%20a%203D%20printing%20service%20such%20as,file%2C%20select%20your%20material%2C%20technology%20and%20fi)]  
How to Order Your 3D Print 

1. Prepare Your 3D File: Export your design into an industry-standard file format (e.g., .STL, .OBJ, or .STEP). 
2. Choose Your Service: Submit your file and specifications to a 3D printing provider: 

	• For Vietnam or Regional Asia: Use 3D Smart Solutions or international networks like Xometry to get an instant estimate. 
	• For Nanchang, China: Contact dedicated rapid manufacturing companies like Intamsys. [[1](https://www.intamsys.com/printing-service), [3](https://3d-smartsolutions.com/en/#:~:text=HOTLINE.%200345%20699%20777.%20Large%2Dformat%203D%20printer.), [4](https://www.rapiddirect.com/blog/top-10-3d-printing-companies/#:~:text=Table_title:%2010%20Best%203D%20Printing%20Companies%20Comparison,%7C%20%2D%2D%2D%20%7C%20%7C%20RapidDirect%20%7C%20F)]  

3. Select Materials & Post-Processing: Specify your required material (e.g., Nylon, Resin, ABS, or Carbon Fiber) and any post-print finishing like polishing, sanding, or painting. 
4. Finalize Quote: The provider will review your file for design errors, generate a manufacturing quote, and send it to you for payment. 
5. Shipping: Confirm your delivery address in Nanchang or Vietnam to receive your parts once production is complete. [[1](https://www.intamsys.com/printing-service)]  

If you'd like, let me know:What specific part or object you are trying to print.The dimensions of your model.Whether you need specialized materials (like medical-grade polymers or metal).I can help you narrow down the best manufacturer for your project. 
AI responses may include mistakes.

[1] https://www.intamsys.com/printing-service
[2] [https://www.sculpteo.com/en/](https://www.sculpteo.com/en/#:~:text=Using%20a%203D%20printing%20service%20such%20as,file%2C%20select%20your%20material%2C%20technology%20and%20fi)
[3] [https://3d-smartsolutions.com/en/](https://3d-smartsolutions.com/en/#:~:text=HOTLINE.%200345%20699%20777.%20Large%2Dformat%203D%20printer.)
[4] [https://www.rapiddirect.com/blog/top-10-3d-printing-companies/](https://www.rapiddirect.com/blog/top-10-3d-printing-companies/#:~:text=Table_title:%2010%20Best%203D%20Printing%20Companies%20Comparison,%7C%20%2D%2D%2D%20%7C%20%7C%20RapidDirect%20%7C%20F)
[5] https://www.intamsys.com/industries-medical
```
